## IP and Security Checklist (required for all repos)
- [ ] No VOICE dimension weights or scoring formulas committed
- [ ] No PHI or patient-adjacent data in any file
- [ ] No acquisition target names in any public-facing file
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
- [ ] No internal Notion links committed to public files
